title: [DvsC]Dalek vs Cyberman
description: Exterminate, or Delete: that is the question
body:
This is a very simple mod that adds Dalek and Cyberman.

The Dalek can only spawn through The Genesis Ark.

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。

![The Genesis Ark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee8b02f82bd2d5ed0a8536232db37f8c1429ab8.png)

The Genesis Ark will randomly generate random types of Dalek.

![All Dalek](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cff1eac798c02c471f208f2457bfd256e0ec42c.png)

Cyberman can only spawn through Cyber Upgrade House

![Cyber Upgrade House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e4ac9ee0b3cf8b64d263558f5a346776252a59.png)

Cyber Upgrade House will randomly generate random types of Cyberman.

![All Cyberman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f9430d3e8fc24a85b702fa00bf339d3e498f649.png)
